basics.name: Rahul Patil
basics.label: Software Developer | Morgan Stanley | Applied CS
basics.summary: I’m a Full Stack Developer with strong experience building scalable, production-grade applications using React, Python, Java, FastAPI, Docker, and AWS. My work spans frontend engineering, backend APIs, cloud deployments, and Generative AI integrations. I’ve delivered projects that solve real problems—from AI-powered search platforms to multi-step React apps, automation tools, and developer-focused AI assistants. I enjoy taking ownership, debugging deep issues, improving system design, and building clean, maintainable software.

bullets: Technology Associate role at Morgan Stanley

Bash Scripting and Shell Programming (Linux Command Line)
Python for Data Science and Machine Learning
